task_completion.description: Verify that the required shape keys are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Properties editor, under the Object Data Properties tab (green triangle icon), the Shape Keys list should contain exactly or at least 'Basis', 'Spherical', and 'Stretched'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Spherical' shape key transforms the object into a sphere.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The object ('MorphCube') should appear as a sphere in the 3D viewport. This can be seen either in Edit Mode while the 'Spherical' shape key is selected and being edited (e.g., using 'To Sphere'), or in Object Mode when the 'Spherical' value slider is increased.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Stretched' shape key scales the object vertically.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The object ('MorphCube') should appear stretched vertically (along the Z-axis) as a tall column in the 3D viewport. This can be seen in Edit Mode while the 'Stretched' shape key is selected and scaled, or in Object Mode when the 'Stretched' value slider is increased.

task_completion.description: Verify that the timeline frame range is set to Start: 1 and End: 60.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Timeline editor (usually at the bottom of the screen), the 'Start' field should be set to 1 and the 'End' field should be set to 60.

task_completion.description: Verify that keyframes are inserted to animate the shape keys at frames 1, 30, and 60.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for keyframe indicators (yellow/orange diamond icons) in the Timeline or Dope Sheet at frames 1, 30, and 60. Alternatively, look for the shape key 'Value' sliders highlighted in yellow (indicating a keyframe on the current frame) or green (indicating an animated property) while the playhead is at frames 1, 30, or 60.

task_completion.description: Verify that the project is saved to the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top title bar of the Blender window should display 'morph_animation.blend', or a 'Save As' dialog should be visible with the path set to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/morph_animation.blend'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Blender GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the agent interacting with Blender's menus, panels, and 3D viewport, rather than just running a Python script in the Scripting workspace or terminal to bypass manual work.

integrity.description: Verify that the actual Blender software is being used.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be Blender 4.2, with its standard layout, icons, and 3D viewport, not a mockup or a different application.

integrity.description: Verify that the animation was built progressively.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the progression of creating shape keys, editing the mesh, and adding keyframes, rather than just opening a pre-made completed file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target object is 'MorphCube', a subdivided cube (level 3). The task requires exactly 3 shape keys: 'Basis' (auto-created), 'Spherical', and 'Stretched'. The 'Spherical' key should transform the cube to a sphere (factor 1.0), and 'Stretched' should scale it by 2.5 on the Z axis. The timeline must be set to Start: 1, End: 60. Keyframes must be inserted at frames 1, 30, and 60 to animate the shape key values. The final file must be saved to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/morph_animation.blend.
